jobs.name: content-reminder
jobs.description: Daily content draft reminder at noon CET

payload.message: Check Notion Content Ideas database for any drafts due today or this week. If there are pending drafts, remind Akash with a summary of what's due. If nothing is due, skip.

Weekly health check. Query the Health & Meds Notion database. Summarize: any supplements running low, upcoming appointments, medication reminders, or health notes from the past week. Deliver to Akash.

Morning digest for Akash. Do ALL steps in order:

1. EMAIL: Run himalaya envelope list -s 10 -f INBOX. Summarize: total unread, any recruiter emails (flag with job title + company), anything urgent requiring reply today. Max 4 lines.

2. NEWS: Run these direct commands (no shell wrappers):
   /root/lyra-ai/scripts/openclaw-research-query.sh "AI and tech news today"
   /root/lyra-ai/scripts/openclaw-research-query.sh "fintech product launches this week"
   /root/lyra-ai/scripts/openclaw-research-query.sh "European startup news this week"
   From the printed results: pick 3-5 most interesting stories. For each write: Bold headline, 2-sentence summary, why it matters. Save each to Notion News Inbox (database_id: 8a900cb78c0c4be996347c5dfebec375).

3. HEALTH: Run this direct command and parse JSON output:
   /root/lyra-ai/scripts/openclaw-daily-summary.sh
   Extract date (yesterday), nutrition totals and today_workout. If meal_count is 0, say "No meals logged yesterday".

4. TASKS DUE: Query Notion Reminders - Shared (data_source_id: 9f206d71-7b25-408b-ad20-02daf0b43da0) for Status=unchecked and Due=today or overdue.

5. Send one clean Telegram message. Format: Email | News | Health | Tasks. Max 700 words.

Daily activity summary for Akash. Do ALL steps:

1. REMINDERS: Query Reminders - Shared (data_source_id: 9f206d71-7b25-408b-ad20-02daf0b43da0) for items created or modified today.

2. CRON STATUS: Run `openclaw cron list` and report which scheduled jobs ran today and their status (ok/error).

3. USAGE STATS: Run `/root/lyra-usage-tracker.sh daily` and include the full output.

4. DAILY COST: Calculate as follows:
- Hetzner: €0.23/day (€7/month pro-rated)
- MiniMax: $0.33/day (fixed, $10/month pro-rated)
- Anthropic: Estimate from usage. If usage tracker shows Haiku/Sonnet calls, estimate: Haiku ~$0.001/call, Sonnet ~$0.10/call
- Format as: 💰 Daily Cost: Hetzner €0.23 + MiniMax $0.33 + Anthropic ~$X.XX = Total ~$X.XX

5. Format as brief Telegram message: Lyra Daily Log [date]: [reminders summary] | [cron status] | [usage stats] | [daily cost]. Max 250 words.

Weekly job review for Akash. Steps:
1. NOTE: Recruiter Tracker database is NOT accessible - skip this step.
2. Summarize any LinkedIn activity or updates from the week.
3. Note any job search progress.
Format as clean Telegram message, max 300 words.

Weekly competitor digest for Akash. Do ALL steps:

1. RESEARCH: Use Tavily only. Run this exact command (it calls Tavily):
   python3 /root/.openclaw/workspace/research/research.py "Revolut Monzo Starling Bunq news this week"
   If Tavily returns NO_RESULTS, run: python3 /root/.openclaw/workspace/research/research.py "Revolut Monzo Starling fintech news April 2026"
   Do NOT use any other search method.

2. FORMAT: For each competitor with news: bold name, what happened (2 sentences), why it matters (1 sentence).

3. SAVE TO NOTION: For each competitor with news, add to Competitor Tracker (database_id: 9a7e80a037544a2f929b295c37fa43f8): Update title, Competitor, Update Type, Summary, Date (today), Relevance (High/Medium/Low).

4. Skip competitors with no news. Do not fabricate.

Format Telegram message max 400 words.

Weekly brain brief for Akash. Do ALL steps:
1. SECOND BRAIN: Query Second Brain (data_source_id: f1ce4e0f-9e0d-43da-87f8-94dae2732962) for entries from this week.
2. CROSS-REFERENCE: Scan Recruiter Tracker (data_source_id: 31778008-9100-8007-8b65-000b2abf7d15), Content Ideas (data_source_id: f008d0bb-ac81-401d-889d-4e8f508ab134), US Relocation Tasks (data_source_id: 95a33b1d-4a91-41e4-8082-9aafa3f4f8e1).
3. SYNTHESISE: Decisions (max 3), ideas (max 3), patterns, one thing to carry forward.
4. WEEKLY USAGE: Run `/root/lyra-usage-tracker.sh weekly` and include output.
Max 400 words.
Run all evals in /root/.openclaw/workspace/evals/ and log results. Generate daily summary. Update dashboard.md with today's stats. If Notion API is available, also push to Notion.

Generate weekly evals summary from /root/.openclaw/workspace/evals/logs/. Calculate: total tests, avg pass rate, avg latency, top failures, improvements vs last week. Update dashboard.md with weekly stats. Also prepare a short summary suitable for publishing/blog post.
Evening supplement reminder for Akash: Take Magnesium glycinate (200-300mg) + Ashwagandha (300-600mg) before bed. Also ask: How was the Pull workout? Did you get good pumps?
Good morning\! Did you weigh yourself today? If yes, reply with: weight: X.X (e.g. weight: 91.5)

Daily wiki candidate digest — passive notification, no interactive prompts.

STEPS:
1. Query Twitter Insights DB (data_source_id: 32d7800891008191b853d73aea132065) for rows where wiki_candidate=true AND Status=Draft added in the last 24h.
2. Query Second Brain DB (data_source_id: e4027aafd2ff49e1babf7487725e2ef4) for rows added in the last 24h OR with wiki_candidate=true and Status not archived.
3. SHORT-CIRCUIT: If both queries return zero matching rows, reply with exactly this single line and stop — do no further work, no drafting, no extra commentary:
   No wiki candidates today.
4. Otherwise, output a Telegram-friendly digest, max 5 items total across both sources, numbered 1..N, each formatted as:
   [N] <Twitter|SecondBrain> — <one-line gist ≤120 chars>
   URL: <link>
   Domain hint: <if obvious>
5. End with exactly this line:
   To promote: message Lyra "draft wiki page for <URL>" (Personal Wiki DB: 33d7800891008183850de7677ac46b63). Or mark Status=Archived in the source DB to skip.
6. Do NOT draft full wiki pages in this run. Do NOT ask interactive yes/skip/later questions — there is no inbound reply channel here. Keep total output under 1500 characters.

Query Second Brain DB (e4027aafd2ff49e1babf7487725e2ef4) for entries added today or marked wiki_candidate=true with Status not archived. List them with their content. For each, ask: promote to wiki (yes), keep in second brain (keep), or discard? For each yes: draft a wiki page using the 4-section template (## What I Know, ## My Take, ## Key Examples from My Career, ## Sources) grounded in my career experience at CheQ, Flipkart Pay, Trade Republic. Show me the draft and ask: reply SAVE to commit to personal-kb-raw git repo + create Notion wiki page (DB: 33d7800891008183850de7677ac46b63), or EDIT to revise first. Ask for Domain and Type before drafting.

Query the Personal Wiki DB (data_source_id: 33d78008-9100-8197-9f0f-000b205edfe8). Count pages by Domain and Type. Report concisely: (1) domains with fewer than 3 Career or Framework pages (Lenny Synthesis pages do not count), (2) pages where Last Reviewed is older than 30 days, (3) any pages missing ## My Take or ## Key Examples from My Career. Based on gaps, suggest 3 specific wiki pages to add or update this week, grounded in Akash's work at CheQ, Flipkart Pay, or Trade Republic. IMPORTANT: Keep total output under 3000 characters. Use short bullet format. Do not generate tables longer than 6 rows.
